what_went_well: Comprehensive context gathering: reviewed existing admin patterns (TenantsController CRUD, dashboard widgets, sidebar navigation), Telegram backend services (TelegramBotRegistry, TelegramApiClient, repositories), and archived proposal tasks
Spec deltas cover all 3 capabilities with 14 requirements and 34 scenarios total
Design decisions align with established codebase patterns (manual HTML forms, multi-action controller for CRUD, single-action for read-only)
Tasks are ordered by dependency and scoped to be completable in single agent sessions
Validation passed on first attempt with --strict mode
improvement_suggestions: Activity counts (24h/7d) require a message tracking mechanism that may not exist yet — the telegram_chats table only has last_message_at, not per-message timestamps. The coder should verify if a message log table exists or if activity counts should be derived from OpenSearch logs instead.
The webhook status indicator requires calling getWebhookInfo for each bot on page load, which could be slow with many bots. Consider caching webhook info or fetching it on-demand via AJAX.
